message: Kysely has a MySQL SQL Injection via Insufficient Backslash Escaping in `sql.lit(string)` usage or similar methods that append string literal values into the compiled SQL strings
SQL Injection via unsanitized JSON path keys when ignoring/silencing compilation errors or using `Kysely<any>`.
